parity_goal: Preserve alignment-first brainstorming with a fixed active-turn structure, short research detours, and permission-based wrap behavior.

cases.prompt: brainstorm I keep saying I want a productized AI offer, but I cannot tell if I mean a real offer or just a clearer way to talk about custom work.
expected_output_shape: no early challenge or hidden reframe

cases.prompt: Let's brainstorm this topic. We keep collapsing our AI thinking back into custom delivery.
Help me think through examples of agencies packaging AI work without turning it into endless custom service.
I think we are mostly repeating ourselves now. Is there enough here to stop?
